items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 44
items.note: For 'Overcoming the Heavenly Kings' — defeat the Elite Four and Lance in a single session in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 44 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: Swinub/Piloswine and Skarmory excel here, especially against Lance; a caught Suicune (and possibly Entei/Raikou) is great across the Elite Four.
